solutions.solution: (a) Copy completely belongs to the group of stationery while car is entirely different. This can be expressed as given in option (a).
(e) Both coal mines and factory are located in the field. This can be expressed as given in option (e).
(e) Dhoti and sari are entirely different but both belong to the group of clothes. This can be expressed as given in option (e).
(b) A book has chapters and a chapter has topics. This can be expressed as given in option (b).
(e) A class has both boys and girls but boys and girls are entirely different from each other. This can be expressed as given in option (e).
(b) Tea and coffee are different type of drink.
(c) Some thieves are pick pockets and they both come under the category of criminals. This can be expressed as given in option (c).
(c) Kanpur is a city in the state of Uttar Pradesh while Jaipur is entirely different as it is a city in Rajasthan. This can be expressed as given in option (c).

(d) Both classical and pop are types of songs but both types are entirely different. This can be expressed as given in option (d).
(d) Maize and sugarcane are entirely different but both completely belong to the group of crops. This can be expressed as given in option (d).
(e) Owl completely belongs to the group of birds while elephant is entirely different from both. This can be expressed as given in option (e).
(a) India is completely inside Asia while Delhi is completely inside India. This can be expressed as given in option (a).
(b) Some of the lawyers and doctors may be women. This can be expressed as given in option (b).
